sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73802" key="o)morga/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀμοργ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n73802.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀμόργνυμι</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wipe off,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὠμόργαζε</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:361" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">361</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (cj. Ilgen for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὡμάρταζε</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
